title: Acrit's Fancy Nature
description: Acrit's Fancy Nature its an immersive experience for your world through visual variations in vegetation
body:
# Acrit’s Fancy Nature

Acrit’s Fancy Nature is a resource pack designed to enhance environmental immersion through rich visual variety and more natural-looking vegetation.

# 📋 Compatibility & Requirements

**Supported Versions:** Minecraft **1.21.1 and above**.

**Requirements:** Completely Vanilla. No external mods (such as OptiFine or Iris) are required—just load the pack and play.

**Optional Compatibility:** Supports **ResPackOpts**, allowing additional customization options.

Current ResPackOpts settings:

 **Leaves Style**

  * Full
  * Branchless

**Tested Versions:** The resourse pack has currently been tested on **1.21.1**, **26.1**, and **26.2**. While it may work on other versions, unforeseen issues or visual inconsistencies may occur.

---

# 🗺️ Roadmap & Future Development

The following features are actively being worked on:

* Fixes & Additions
* Additional foliage variations
* Expanded customization options through ResPackOpts

Many features are still under development and may change, be refined, or be replaced in future updates.

---

# ⚙️ Known Issues

* The textures of **Leaves Leafs** and **Leaves Branch** appear darker in version **26.2**.
* Leaves models are more prone to **Z-fighting** than intended.
* The **Leaves** texture rotates together with the models.
* The emissive texture of the **Firefly Bush** is currently missing.
* Colors are not displayed correctly in version **1.20.1**.

---

# ⚙️ Performance

Current performance impact is considered:

* **Low to Medium** in version **V0.6**

Recent additions include denser and thinner variants for several foliage models.

As additional features, model variations, and customization options are added in future updates, performance impact may increase moderately depending on hardware and graphical settings.
